# Apache SeaTunnel
> Machine-readable discovery entry points for the current public Apache SeaTunnel documentation.
- Canonical site: https://seatunnel.apache.org/
- Sitemap: https://seatunnel.apache.org/sitemap.xml
- Chinese sitemap: https://seatunnel.apache.org/zh-CN/sitemap.xml
- Full docs inventory: https://seatunnel.apache.org/llms-full.txt
- English docs home: https://seatunnel.apache.org/docs/introduction/about
- Chinese docs home: https://seatunnel.apache.org/zh-CN/docs/introduction/about
- Current English docs pages: 439
- Current Chinese docs pages: 439
- Build source: the scheduled website workflow syncs docs from apache/seatunnel before every build.
- Scope: only public current docs URLs that actually landed in the final built HTML output are listed here.
